name: Elvira's 40th Anniversary, Very Scary, Very Special Special
original_name: Elvira's 40th Anniversary, Very Scary, Very Special Special
overview: It’s always tough turning 40, but what better way to mark the occasion than a one-night stand with Shudder, the spookiest of streamers? It’s going to be the ultimate Hallow-anniversa-ween bash, and you don’t want to miss it! Hosted by the Mistress of the Dark herself and features a four-film marathon. Elvira, Mistress of the Dark (1988) House on Haunted Hill (1959) The City of the Dead (1960) Messiah of Evil (1973)

trailers.title: Shudder Presents: Elvira's 40th Anniversary Very Scary, Very Special Special
